Looks like it doesn't like below links:

(line   37) broken    docs_5G_PNF_Software_Upgrade_netconf_with_EM.html -

But there hasn't been any changes to those recently so no idea what's the issue.

...so is this a red herring and the real problem is something completely else or has something changed regarding the sphinx-build linkcheck?
